project_area: Affordable housing solutions (rental and first-time homeownership) through new construction or substantial rehabilitation
demographic_requirements: Units restricted to 30% or less of area median income and/or ADA units over the minimum required 10% threshold may receive bonus funding
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants are developers creating affordable rental housing units or first-time homeownership opportunities in Worcester. Grants provide up to 25% of total development cost or $150,000 per unit, whichever is less. Applications accepted on a rolling basis.
